points: 當引述動詞 (said, told) 為過去式時,從句時態必須「後移」一格:現在式→過去式 (is→was)、現在進行→過去進行 (am doing→was doing)、現在完成與過去式→過去完成 (have done / did→had done)、will→would、can→could、may→might、must→had to。
代名詞要隨「新說話者的立場」調整:第一人稱 I/we/my/our 通常變成 he/she/they/his/her/their,第二人稱 you 依文意指向實際的人;受詞代名詞 me→him/her 也同步轉換。
時間與地點副詞要轉換以符合「事後轉述」的時空:now→then、today→that day、tonight→that night、tomorrow→the next day / the following day、yesterday→the day before、ago→before、here→there、this→that、these→those。
若引述的是「不變的真理或現在仍成立的事實」,時態可不後移 (The teacher said the earth is round.);這是會考常設的例外陷阱。
notes.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 360 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="190" fill="#f3e7df"/><text x="180" y="26" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">直述句轉間接引述</text><rect x="20" y="42" width="320" height="34" rx="6" fill="#eef4f2" stroke="#5aa874"/><text x="30" y="63" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">He said: "I am tired."</text><line x1="180" y1="80" x2="180" y2="108" stroke="#c9755c" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="180,114 175,104 185,104" fill="#c9755c"/><rect x="20" y="118" width="320" height="34" rx="6" fill="#eef4f2" stroke="#5aa874"/><text x="30" y="139" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">He said he was tired.</text><circle cx="168" cy="131" r="15" fill="none" stroke="#d98072" stroke-width="2"/><text x="180" y="176" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#c9755c">am→was 時態後移</text></svg>
notes.caption: 引述動詞為過去式時,從句時態後移一格、代名詞與時空副詞隨之調整。
notes.trap: ⚠ 別忘了「同步」轉換三件事:時態、代名詞、時間地點副詞,三者常一起考;另外「永恆真理」時態可不後移,易被誤判為錯。

notes.h: 問句與祈使句的間接引述
points: 是非問句 (Yes/No question) 轉間接:用 if 或 whether 引導,並把「助動詞+主詞」的倒裝語序「還原成直述語序」(主詞+動詞),且時態一樣後移。例:"Are you OK?" → She asked if I was OK.
wh- 問句轉間接:保留疑問詞 (what/where/when/why/how) 當連接詞,但其後語序改為「直述語序」,不可再倒裝、不可再加 do/does/did。例:"Where does she live?" → He asked where she lived.
祈使句轉間接:用 tell/ask/order + 受詞 + to + 原形動詞 (told me to wait);否定祈使句用 not to V (asked me not to be late);請求語氣常用 ask,命令語氣常用 tell/order。
引述問句時引述動詞改用 ask (不可用 say);間接問句句尾用句點而非問號,這是標點常見陷阱。
notes.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 360 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="190" fill="#eef4f2"/><text x="180" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">問句轉間接:語序還原</text><rect x="20" y="38" width="320" height="32" rx="6" fill="#f3e7df" stroke="#c9755c"/><text x="30" y="58" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">"Are you OK?" (倒裝)</text><line x1="180" y1="72" x2="180" y2="96" stroke="#5aa874" stroke-width="2"/><polygon points="180,102 175,92 185,92" fill="#5aa874"/><rect x="20" y="106" width="320" height="32" rx="6" fill="#f3e7df" stroke="#c9755c"/><text x="30" y="126" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">asked if I was OK.</text><text x="30" y="160" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#f0a52e">用 if/whether,還原直述語序</text><text x="30" y="178" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#c9755c">句尾用句點不用問號</text></svg>
notes.caption: 問句要還原成直述語序、是非題用 if/whether、祈使句用 tell/ask sb (not) to V。
notes.trap: ⚠ 間接問句最常錯在「沒還原語序」或「多留了 do/does/did」;且引述問句要用 ask、句尾用句點,別保留問號或倒裝。

quiz.stem: Tom said to me yesterday, "I will finish the report tomorrow." → Tom told me yesterday that he ____ the report ____.
options: will finish / the next day
would finish / the next day
would finish / tomorrow
will finish / that day
quiz.explanation: 引述動詞 told 為過去式,will→would 時態後移;說話時間是 yesterday,所以原句的 tomorrow 要轉為 the next day(隔天)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 多數人記得 will→would,卻忘了 tomorrow 也要隨時空轉換成 the next day;若 tomorrow 不變則時間基準錯亂。

quiz.stem: Choose the correct reported form: She said, "I have already eaten lunch here."
options: She said she has already eaten lunch here.
She said she had already eaten lunch there.
She said she had already ate lunch there.
She said she already ate lunch here.
quiz.explanation: have eaten(現在完成)後移為 had eaten(過去完成),分詞 eaten 不變;here→there。選項C誤用 ate、A未後移、D既未後移又改錯時態。
quiz.trap: ⚠ had 之後仍接過去分詞 eaten,不可寫成 had ate;同時 here 必須轉成 there。

quiz.stem: "Did you see my keys this morning?" he asked her. → He asked her ____.
options: if she saw his keys that morning
if she had seen his keys that morning
did she see his keys that morning
whether she had seen my keys this morning
quiz.explanation: 是非問句用 if 引導並還原語序;did see→had seen(過去完成);my→his、this morning→that morning。選項C保留倒裝、A時態未到位、D未轉 my/this。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 過去式問句 Did you see 轉間接時動詞要後移成 had seen,且去掉 did、還原成 she had seen 的直述語序。

quiz.stem: "Where are you going now?" my mother asked me. → My mother asked me where ____.
options: was I going then
I was going then
I am going now
I was going now
quiz.explanation: wh- 問句保留 where,語序還原為「主詞+動詞」I was going(不可倒裝);are→was 後移,now→then。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 最常見錯誤是保留倒裝 was I going;間接問句一律用直述語序,且 now 要改成 then。

quiz.stem: "Don't touch the wet paint!" the worker warned us. → The worker warned us ____.
options: don't touch the wet paint
not to touch the wet paint
to not touch the wet paint
that we didn't touch the wet paint
quiz.explanation: 否定祈使句轉間接用 not to + 原形動詞:warned us not to touch。選項C的 to not touch 語序不自然、A未轉換、D用法錯誤。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 否定祈使句的 not 放在 to 之前(not to V),不是 to not V;且不可保留原本的 Don't。

quiz.stem: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
options: He said me that he was busy.
He told to me that he was busy.
He told me that he was busy.
He said me he is busy.
quiz.explanation: tell 後直接接受詞(tell me),say 不直接接人(需 say to me)。故 told me 正確;said me、told to me 皆錯,D 還未後移。
quiz.trap: ⚠ say 與 tell 的受詞規則相反:tell sb / say to sb。記成 said me 或 told to me 都是典型錯誤。

quiz.stem: "I bought this car two years ago," he said. → He said he ____ that car two years ____.
options: bought / ago
had bought / before
has bought / before
had bought / ago
quiz.explanation: 過去式 bought→had bought(過去完成);ago 在間接引述中轉為 before;this→that。
quiz.trap: ⚠ ago 是以「說話當下」為基準的詞,轉述時必須改成 before;許多人只改時態卻漏改 ago。

quiz.stem: "Can you help me move these boxes?" she asked him. → She asked him ____.
options: if he can help her move those boxes
if he could help her move those boxes
could he help her move those boxes
whether he could help me move these boxes
quiz.explanation: can→could,is 還原語序,me→her、these→those;這裡 Can you...? 是請求,用 if + 直述語序。選項C保留倒裝、A未後移、D未轉 me/these。
quiz.trap: ⚠ can 要後移為 could,且代名詞 me→her、指示詞 these→those 須一併轉換,語序也要還原。

quiz.stem: The teacher said, "Water boils at 100°C." Which is the BEST reported form?
options: The teacher said water boiled at 100°C.
The teacher said water boils at 100°C.
The teacher said water had boiled at 100°C.
The teacher said water would boil at 100°C.
quiz.explanation: 科學真理/恆常事實在間接引述中時態可不後移,故保留 boils 最佳。其餘把現在式改掉反而暗示「現在不成立」。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 遇到不變的真理(科學定律、恆常習慣)時態可保持不變;機械式後移成 boiled 反而是陷阱選項。

quiz.stem: Identify the sentence with NO error in reported speech.
options: She asked me what time is it.
She asked me what time it was.
She asked me what time was it.
She asked what time is it then.
quiz.explanation: 間接 wh- 問句須用直述語序且時態後移:what time it was。A、C、D 皆保留倒裝或未後移。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 「what time it was」才正確;保留 is it / was it 的倒裝是最常見的錯誤。

quiz.stem: "You must hand in your homework today," the teacher told us. → The teacher told us that we ____ hand in our homework ____.
options: must / today
had to / that day
must / that day
had to / today
quiz.explanation: 表「義務」的 must 後移為 had to;your→our;today→that day。選項中只有 had to + that day 全部正確。
quiz.trap: ⚠ must 表義務時轉述要變 had to,且 today→that day;若 must 不變或 today 不變都算錯。

quiz.stem: "Why didn't you call me last night?" she asked him. → She asked him why ____ the night before.
options: didn't he call her
he hadn't called her
he didn't call her
hadn't he called her
quiz.explanation: wh- 問句保留 why、語序還原;否定的過去式 didn't call→hadn't called(過去完成);me→her;last night→the night before。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 否定問句後移時 didn't call 要變 hadn't called,並去掉助動詞 did、還原成 he hadn't called 的直述語序。

quiz.stem: Which is the correct DIRECT speech for: He asked me whether I had ever been to Japan?
options: He asked me, "Have you ever been to Japan?"
He asked me, "Had you ever been to Japan?"
He asked me, "Did you ever go to Japan?"
He asked me, "Have I ever been to Japan?"
quiz.explanation: 反向還原:had been 來自原句的現在完成 have been;whether 對應是非問句故還原倒裝 Have you...?;I→you。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 間接轉直接時 had been 的「原形」是 have been(現在完成),而非過去完成;且 I 要還原成第二人稱 you。

quiz.stem: "Let's not waste any more time," Ben suggested. → Ben suggested that ____.
options: let's not waste any more time
they should not waste any more time
not to waste any more time
they shouldn't to waste any more time
quiz.explanation: Let's (提議) 轉間接常用 suggested (that) + 主詞 + (should) + 原形;否定為 should not waste。選項C、D 文法錯誤,A 未轉換。
quiz.trap: ⚠ Let's 的間接引述不可用 to V,而用 suggested that they (should) + 原形動詞;否定放在 should not 後。

quiz.stem: "I am meeting my friends here this evening," Anna said. → Anna said she ____ her friends ____ that evening.
options: was meeting / there
is meeting / here
had met / there
was meeting / here
quiz.explanation: 現在進行 am meeting→was meeting;here→there;this evening→that evening。選項A 同時正確處理時態與地點副詞。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 現在進行式後移成過去進行式(was meeting),同時 here→there;只改一個常導致錯選。

quiz.stem: Find the INCORRECT reported sentence.
options: He told me he would come the next day.
She asked if I could swim.
They said that they have finished the project.
He ordered the soldiers to stop.
quiz.explanation: C 的引述動詞 said 為過去式,從句 have finished 應後移為 had finished,故 C 錯誤。A、B、D 皆正確。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 主句為過去式 said 時,從句現在完成 have finished 必須後移成 had finished,保留 have 即為錯誤。

quiz.stem: "How long have you been waiting?" the clerk asked us. → The clerk asked us how long ____.
options: have we been waiting
we had been waiting
had we been waiting
we have been waiting
quiz.explanation: wh- 問句保留 how long、語序還原;現在完成進行 have been waiting→had been waiting。選項A、C 倒裝或未後移、D 未後移。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 現在完成進行式後移為 had been waiting,且須用直述語序 we had...,不可保留 had we 倒裝。

quiz.stem: "Please don't tell anyone my secret," she begged me. → She begged me ____ anyone her secret.
options: to not tell
not to tell
don't tell
not telling
quiz.explanation: 否定請求轉間接用 beg/ask sb not to V:not to tell;my→her。選項A 語序錯、C 未轉換、D 用法錯誤。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 否定的 not 必須緊接在 to 前(not to tell),且 Please 在間接引述中省略、my→her。

quiz.stem: "We will have left before you arrive," they said. → They said they ____ before I ____.
options: would have left / arrived
will have left / arrive
had left / arrived
would have left / arrive
quiz.explanation: 未來完成 will have left→would have left;時間從句 arrive→arrived 配合過去基準;you→I。選項A 兩動詞都正確後移。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 未來完成式 will have left 後移為 would have left,連帶時間從句的 arrive 也要變 arrived 才一致。

quiz.stem: Which sentence correctly reports: "Don't be so noisy, children!"?
options: She told the children don't be so noisy.
She told the children not to be so noisy.
She said the children not to be so noisy.
She told to the children not be so noisy.
quiz.explanation: 否定祈使句:tell sb not to V → told the children not to be so noisy。A 未轉換、C 用 said sb 錯誤、D 多了 to 且漏 to。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 祈使句引述用 tell sb (not) to V,動詞用 tell 不用 say;且 not to be,不可寫 not be。

quiz.stem: "I saw him here yesterday," the witness said. → The witness said ____.
options: she saw him there the day before
she had seen him there the day before
she had seen him here yesterday
she saw him there yesterday
quiz.explanation: saw→had seen;here→there;yesterday→the day before。選項B 三項全部正確;其餘各漏一項。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 三項要同時轉:時態 had seen、地點 there、時間 the day before;漏改 yesterday 或 here 都是常見錯。

quiz.stem: "Has the train already left?" he wondered. → He wondered ____.
options: if had the train already left
whether the train had already left
if the train has already left
whether had the train already left
quiz.explanation: 是非問句用 whether/if + 直述語序;Has...left→had...left(後移)。選項A、D 保留倒裝、C 未後移。
quiz.trap: ⚠ if/whether 之後一律用直述語序(the train had left),不可再倒裝成 had the train。

quiz.stem: Choose the BEST reported speech: "You should see a doctor," my friend advised me.
options: My friend advised me that I should see a doctor.
My friend advised me to see a doctor.
My friend advised me seeing a doctor.
Both A and B are acceptable.
quiz.explanation: advise 既可接 that 子句 (advised that I should see),也可接 to V (advised me to see),兩者皆通順正確;C 的 advised me seeing 用法錯誤。
quiz.trap: ⚠ advise 有兩種正確結構:advise sb to V 與 advise that...;只選一個會漏掉同樣正確的另一個,故選 Both。

quiz.stem: "I'll call you when I get home tonight," Dad said. → Dad said he ____ me when he ____ home that night.
options: will call / gets
would call / got
would call / gets
will call / got
quiz.explanation: will call→would call;時間從句 get→got 配合過去基準;tonight→that night。選項B 主從子句時態一致且 tonight 正確轉換。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 主句 would call 後移後,when 引導的時間從句 get 也要一起變 got,且 tonight→that night。

quiz.stem: Which transformation of a wh- question is CORRECT?
options: "What do you want?" → He asked what did I want.
"What do you want?" → He asked what I wanted.
"What do you want?" → He asked what do I want.
"What do you want?" → He asked what wanted I.
quiz.explanation: wh- 間接問句去掉助動詞 do、語序還原為 I wanted、時態後移 want→wanted。A 保留 did、C 保留 do、D 語序錯誤。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 含 do/does/did 的問句轉間接時要「消掉助動詞」並把時態併入主動詞(wanted),不可保留 did/do。
